label: Northbeam Logistics — Shipment Delay Visibility
description: Northbeam Logistics asked for 'better visibility into shipment delays' with no further spec. Candidates must find and fix a naive-join data-integrity defect (mismatched shipment ID formats silently drop ~12% of manually tracked delay rows), reconcile a stakeholder conflict between an ops manager who wants a dashboard and a VP who wants a root-cause report, and prove their fix with tests and evals.
